O0400D2_RT_DAY_NUM O0400D2_RT_DAY_NUM O0400D2 Number of Days Respiratory Therapy Administered CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that respiratory therapy was administered for at least 15 minutes in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
 ^=Blank (skip pattern)
